title: Rich Juicy Sick-Day Thai Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: This dish features tender sweet potatoes cooked in a rich and savory sauce that's perfect for those feeling under the weather.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or sesame oil for flavor

ingredients.name: 1 small
ingredients.amount: scallion, white part only, thinly sliced

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup
ingredients.notes: for vegan option use soy-free alternative

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon
ingredients.notes: to make the sauce thicker and richer

ingredients.name: juice of half a lime or 1 tablespoon lemon juice

instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add garlic and scallion, stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add sweet potatoes to the pan; stir-fry until they start to turn golden brown, approximately 5 minutes.
Pour in soy sauce, lime juice (or lemon), and cornstarch mixture. Stir continuously until the sauce thickens and coats the sweet potatoes evenly.
Serve immediately with steamed rice or noodles for a complete meal.
